Sep 27, 2001 PalmOS Software on the Instructional UNIX Systems ------------------------------------------------- A staff member has installed the following PalmOS tools in /home/tmp/garyp/palmos/ while doing a project (Fall

home/tmp/garyp/palmos/ while doing a project (Fall 2001): - prc-tools 2.0.92, which includes: - GCC 2.95.3 cross-compiler for PalmOS - GDB 5.0 compiled to debug PalmOS programs - binutils 2.9.1 for PalmOS - PalmOS SDK v3.5 - PalmOS SDK v

.9.1 for PalmOS - PalmOS SDK v3.5 - PalmOS SDK v3.5 examples - PilRC 2.8 resource file compiler for PalmOS These are compiled for the Solaris X86 systems (po.eecs, torus.cs and the workstations in 275 and 277 Soda). These are readable and ex

s in 275 and 277 Soda). These are readable and executable by all users. If you find them useful, please inform "inst@eecs.berekley.edu" and we will move them to a more permanent location. Thanks to Gary Peck for making this available to ev
hanks to Gary Peck for making this available to everyone. EECS Instructional & Electronics Support Groups 386 & 377 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs, esg@eecs
